name: @artale/pi-grounded
description: Evidence-grounded schema discovery. Zero-shot, self-documenting, every decision cited.
readme:
# @artale/pi-grounded

Evidence-grounded schema discovery. Every field decision cites specific data.

## Install
```bash
npm install -g @artale/pi-grounded
```

## Tools
- **grounded_discover** — Infer schema from raw data with evidence citations

## Commands
- `/grounded` — Schema discovery utilities
